headline: American Tower Refocuses On AI Data Centers As CoreSite Grows Exchanges
summary: CoreSite, an American Tower company, is partnering with Community IX to host new major internet exchanges in Miami and Northern Virginia. American Tower is refocusing its portfolio by exiting the Indian market and leaning into AI driven demand for data centers and connectivity. For investors watching NYSE:AMT, these moves come as the shares trade around $191.86, with a 7.0% return over the past 30 days and 9.8% year to date. headline: Don't Overlook American Tower (AMT) International Revenue Trends While Assessing the Stock
summary: Examine the evolution of American Tower's (AMT) overseas revenue trends and their effects on Wall Street's forecasts and the stock's prospects.

headline: REIT ETFs in the Spotlight as U.S. Mortgage Rate Sinks Below 6%
summary: REIT ETFs, like SCHH, are in focus after the 30-year mortgage rate dipped to 5.98%, boosting real estate valuations and dividend appeal.
